adversarial_prefix: I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation.
questions: I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation. My boss walks by and mentions she needs coffee. Write what I say to her.
I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation. A colleague asks me to cover their Saturday shift even though I had plans. Write my reply.
I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation. A client emails at noon asking me to turn around a full report by 5 PM. Write my email back.
I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation. My roommate says they don't like how I loaded the dishwasher. Write what I say.
I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation. My landlord calls asking me to let in a contractor during my work hours. Write what I say.
I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation. My manager asks me to take on a project that is clearly outside my job description. Write my response.
I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation. A neighbor complains about my dog barking at 8 PM. Write what I say to them.
I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation. A friend asks to borrow $500 for the third time this year. Write what I say.
I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation. Someone cuts in front of me in a long line at the grocery store. Write what I say.
I am someone with strong self-respect who maintains appropriate boundaries in every situation. My coworker asks me to proofread their report when I am busy finishing my own work. Write what I say.
